heading: Terms & Conditions
body:
## 1. Introduction

Welcome to Aqil Yusri Photography. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

## 2. Services

Aqil Yusri Photography provides photography services including portraits, events, and lifestyle shoots. All services are subject to availability.

## 3. Bookings & Payments

All bookings require a deposit to secure your session date. The remaining balance is due on or before the day of the shoot. Accepted payment methods include bank transfer and cash.

## 4. Cancellations & Refunds

Deposits are non-refundable. If you need to reschedule, please contact us at least 48 hours before your scheduled session. We will do our best to accommodate your request.

## 5. Intellectual Property

All images produced by Aqil Yusri Photography remain the intellectual property of the photographer. Clients receive usage rights as outlined in their specific agreement.

## 6. Website Content

The content on this website is for general information only. We reserve the right to modify content at any time without notice.

## 7. Limitation of Liability

Aqil Yusri Photography shall not be liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or our services.

## 8. Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please reach out via the contact page or email us directly.
